instruction: Join strand 1841 and strand 582 (ligate 3' of 1841 to 5' of 582).
output: var s1 = systems[0].strands.find(s => s.id == 1841); var s2 = systems[0].strands.find(s => s.id == 582); if(s1 && s2) edit.ligate(s1.end3, s2.end5);

instruction: Create an RNA strand with sequence AUCGUAAGACUCCAT
Create an RNA duplex with sequence AATT
Translate system 790 by -25.0, -92.1, 48.8
output: var sys = systems[790]; if(sys) { sys.strands.forEach(s => s.getMonomers().forEach(e => e.translatePosition(new THREE.Vector3(-25.0,-92.1,48.8)))); sys.callUpdates(['instanceOffset']); render(); }

instruction: Toggle nucleotide base colors.

Trace the strand from 5' to 3' starting at element 1414.
Select the first and last strand
Hide strands shorter than 13
output: systems[0].strands.forEach(s => { if(s.getLength() < 13) { s.getMonomers().forEach(e => { s.system.fillVec('visibility', 3, e.sid, [0,0,0]); }); } }); systems[0].callUpdates(['instanceVisibility']); render();

instruction: Toggle visibility of elements with IDs [120, 911, 1811]
Color the 5' end of every strand blue (0x0000ff).

instruction: Change the colormap to RdGy.

output: var l = new THREE.AmbientLight(0x3997D3, 1.2); scene.add(l); render();

instruction: Color every even nucleotide red (0xff0000) and odd nucleotide green (0x00ff00).
output: var red = 0xff0000; var green = 0x00ff00; var sys = systems[0]; sys.getMonomers().forEach(e => { var color = (e.id % 2 === 0) ? red : green; var c = new THREE.Color(color); sys.fillVec('nsColors', 3, e.sid, [c.r, c.g, c.b]); }); sys.callUpdates(['instanceColor']); render();
